_note: Teaching fixture. Shape `intent release ./intent --mvp` is PLANNED to emit. Hand-authored to illustrate MVP Readiness. It deliberately does NOT claim production readiness.

overall.reason: All 15 missions are authored, but Billing is the weakest area and gates the MVP: the paid path is under-verified (CreateCheckoutSession drift, ActivateSubscription 0/1). The whole MVP is only as shippable as its weakest journey.

blockersToNextLevel: Verify CreateCheckoutSession (raise 1/5 to full) to move Billing off demo_safe.
Verify ActivateSubscription so the Subscription Billing chain is proven end to end.
Verify RollbackPlan so recovery is proven before deployment readiness is trusted.
Finish InviteTeamMember tests to firm up the Signup chain.
teaching: MVP Readiness lets a team ship a demo honestly without pretending it is production. Each level names the exact missions that hold it back. Authoring a mission is not the same as verifying it.
